tree.name: Max Christie
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: DAL traded Luka Doncic, Maxi Kleber, and Markieff Morris to LAL. DAL received Max Christie, Anthony Davis, and LAL 2029 1st. Utah also involved.
tree.note: Michigan State guard, 2022 #35 pick by Los Angeles Lakers

assetsGivenUp.name: Luka Doncic
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: ATL traded #3 pick (Luka Doncic) to DAL for #5 pick (Trae Young) and a protected 2019 1st round pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Real Madrid guard, drafted #3 by Atlanta, traded to Dallas on draft night

assetsGivenUp.name: 2018 1st Round Pick (#5)
assetsGivenUp.note: DAL's own #5 pick, traded to ATL on draft night for Luka Doncic (#3). Became Trae Young.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2019 1st Round Pick (#10) via DAL
assetsGivenUp.note: Protected first-round pick sent to Atlanta, became #10 overall

assetsGivenUp.name: Maxi Kleber
assetsGivenUp.note: German forward, signed as international free agent from Brose Bamberg

assetsGivenUp.name: Markieff Morris
assetsGivenUp.note: Veteran forward, signed as free agent
